description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow to package mc_rtc. The workflow should trigger on repository dispatches with types package-master and package-release, on push to tags matching v*, and on pull requests to any branch. For tags, check version coherency in CMakeLists.txt and debian/changelog, create a release, and build and upload packages for various ROS distributions and architectures. For pull requests and non-tag pushes, build packages but do not upload. After uploading, sync with a mirror and trigger rebuilds of dependents.
